item.title: INFRA: File Conflict Detection
item.intent: When a file changes on disk while open in the editor, the user must know — silent data loss from sync conflicts is unacceptable.
item.description: Per D-FILE-5. Uses NSFilePresenter to monitor the open file for external changes. When detected: pause auto-save, show non-modal notification with file diff summary ('This file was modified by another app. Reload external changes or keep your version?'). Options: Reload (discard editor state, load new file), Keep Mine (continue with editor version, next save overwrites), View Diff (show what changed — stretch goal). If file is deleted externally: notify user, offer to save to a new location.
acceptanceCriteria: File modified externally while open triggers a visible notification within 5 seconds
User can choose to reload external changes (editor updates to new content)
User can choose to keep their version (next save overwrites external changes)
File deleted externally triggers notification with option to save elsewhere
No data is silently lost in any conflict scenario
